seed.codemap/map.yaml:
# Codemap — maintained by the agent (see docs/arch/CODEMAP.md).
# Rendered by the codemap plugin where installed; readable as YAML everywhere.
codemap: 1
nodes: []
seed.prompts/code-conventions.md:
# Project conventions

- Track work on `dev/plan.yaml`; found bugs go to `dev/issues.yaml` with a `ref` like `path/file.rs#L120`.
- Append a `[step, passing]` point to `dev/progress.yaml` after each test run.
- Keep `codemap/map.yaml` updated as modules change.
